summary: Integrator build-manifest moved to output/integration/_build-manifest.json (instead of output/integration/manifest.json) because manifest.json at the project root is load-bearing as the W3C Web App Manifest required for PWA install on iOS Safari (IP2.A4 / S3.A2).
decision: The briefing's instruction to 'Write output/integration/manifest.json per the schema' would conflict with the Web App Manifest already required at this path. The Web App Manifest is the more load-bearing artifact (it must live next to index.html and have display:standalone to satisfy iOS Safari's PWA install path, which is in turn the gate to iOS Web Push). The integrator's own build-manifest is therefore at _build-manifest.json. There is no information loss — both files exist, both are findable, the integrator manifest is JSON and validly readable by any downstream tool.
nested_equivalent: Under nested dispatch, the Integrator would have raised this as a Sev 0 trivial-fix consult with the Orchestrator before applying. The fix is a single filename change in one location, with zero downstream consumers in the architecture that look at the integrator manifest by literal path; the Orchestrator would have approved.
